subjects.description: A large overhead billboard structure spanning across and above the multi-lane highway, displaying a banking advertisement on the left side and a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic on the right side.
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular gantry-mounted billboard with a clean white/blue background, glossy printed surface, sturdy steel support pillars on either side of the road; the stop sign graphic is bold red with white border and white 'STOP' lettering.
subjects.relationship: The main visual obstacle and focal point the ego vehicle is approaching and reacting to.
subjects.location: center, spanning the upper portion of the frame above the road
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly, perpendicular to the direction of travel
subjects.pose: Static, fixed structure mounted across the highway
subjects.action: Standing fixed across the road, growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance at first, then grows progressively larger and dominant in the frame as the ego vehicle approaches and stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen from the driver's first-person perspective with the dashboard and hood partially visible in the lower frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Dark dashboard, slight reflection on the windshield, hood edge visible at bottom of frame; modern sedan interior framing.
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint from which the entire scene is observed; the vehicle reacting to the billboard.
subjects.location: foreground, implied by the ego camera position
subjects.pose: Traveling forward along the lane, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.action: Driving on the highway then braking to a full stop near the billboard
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady highway speed to gradual deceleration and finally a complete stationary halt.

background_setting: A wide multi-lane commercial strip under overcast mid-morning drizzle, big-box stores, fast-food signs and wide parking aprons lining both sides, the damp asphalt darkened and lightly reflective. Fallen autumn leaves gather at the curb. Rain-dulled markings run beneath the large overhead gantry billboard spanning the strip. Moderate traffic under a flat grey sky.

lighting.direction: Flat diffuse light from a fully clouded sky, no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Soft, near-shadowless light; faint wet reflections of signage on the damp road
lighting.illumination_effect: Even low-contrast grey illumination with a light wet sheen on the asphalt; the billboard face reads clearly, its red STOP graphic bright against the dull backdrop

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective, the damp commercial strip converging toward the billboard; dashboard anchors the lower frame, flat grey sky above
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys of overcast sky and damp asphalt, dull store-sign colors and autumn-leaf browns, with the striking red STOP accent and blue-white bank ad
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating rain-dulled lane markings and rows of storefront signage receding under grey light

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from ego vehicle perspective, decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the billboard and road ahead

context: Automotive perception / advertising scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle responding to a stop sign displayed on an overhead billboard

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at steady speed along the drizzly commercial strip, the overhead billboard visible above the storefronts in the grey distance ahead.

The billboard grows larger; the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become clearly legible against the flat grey sky as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains fully stopped beneath the billboard over the damp strip for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering centered on a red octagonal sign with a white border
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout, increasingly prominent as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic prompting the vehicle to halt

text_and_signage_elements.text: SECURE BANK — Your Future, Our Promise
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Blue and white corporate font with a small shield-style bank logo, clean sans-serif text
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Left portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement occupying the left side of the billboard

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises on the drizzly commercial strip with the billboard small above the storefronts in the grey distance ahead.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow in size; steady forward motion

segments.description: Billboard becomes large and legible against the grey sky; bank ad on left and STOP on right clearly visible as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, reaching a full stop before the billboard by 0:06.
segments.key_changes: Progressive deceleration over four seconds; vehicle slows continuously and reaches a full stop by 0:06; billboard graphics become sharp
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerating steadily to static

segments.description: Vehicle remains fully stationary beneath the billboard over the damp strip for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No motion; scene is held static

temporal_caption: At second 0 the ego car drives forward along a wide commercial strip under overcast mid-morning drizzle, big-box stores and damp parking aprons flanking it and the overhead billboard small above the storefronts in the grey distance. By second 2 the billboard grows and its layout resolves. Between seconds 2 and 6 the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become fully legible against the flat grey sky while the car brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop on the damp road, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by second 6. From second 6 onward the vehicle remains fully stopped through seconds 7 and 8 over the damp strip.
audio_description: Steady tire roll on damp asphalt, a light drizzle patter and intermittent wipers dominate at speed, with faint retail-strip ambience. The engine note lowers and brakes engage with a soft whir during deceleration. In the final segment the audio settles to a quiet idle beneath the light drizzle. No speech or music.
